mapper.sql: pk_schedule_log, pk_schedule, dt_run, status_run, result_run, elapsed_time, run_node, is_manual, pk_createdby, dt_created, pk_modifiedby, dt_modified, ds, version
mapper.select:
select
distinct
,
from schedule_log
order by ${orderByClause}

select
distinct
from schedule_log
order by ${orderByClause}
mapper.insert: insert into schedule_log (pk_schedule_log, pk_schedule, dt_run, status_run, result_run, elapsed_time, run_node, is_manual, pk_createdby, dt_created, pk_modifiedby, dt_modified, ds, version, clob_log, run_cfg) values (#{pkScheduleLog,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{pkSchedule,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{dtRun,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{statusRun,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{resultRun,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{elapsedTime,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{runNode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{isManual,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{pkCreatedby,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{dtCreated,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{pkModifiedby,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{dtModified,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{ds,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{version,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{clobLog,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR}, #{runCfg,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR})

insert into schedule_log
pk_schedule_log,
pk_schedule,
dt_run,
status_run,
result_run,
elapsed_time,
run_node,
is_manual,
pk_createdby,
dt_created,
pk_modifiedby,
dt_modified,
ds,
version,
clob_log,
run_cfg,
#{pkScheduleLog,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
#{pkSchedule,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
#{dtRun,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{statusRun,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
#{resultRun,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{elapsedTime,jdbcType=VARCHAR},

#{clobLog,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR},
#{runCfg,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR},
mapper.update:
update schedule_log
pk_schedule_log = #{record.pkScheduleLog,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
pk_schedule = #{record.pkSchedule,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
dt_run = #{record.dtRun,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
status_run = #{record.statusRun,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
result_run = #{record.resultRun,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
elapsed_time = #{record.elapsedTime,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
run_node = #{record.runNode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
is_manual = #{record.isManual,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
pk_createdby = #{record.pkCreatedby,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
dt_created = #{record.dtCreated,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
pk_modifiedby = #{record.pkModifiedby,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
dt_modified = #{record.dtModified,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
ds = #{record.ds,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
version = #{record.version,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
clob_log = #{record.clobLog,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR},
run_cfg = #{record.runCfg,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR},

update schedule_log set pk_schedule_log = #{record.pkScheduleLog,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, pk_schedule = #{record.pkSchedule,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, dt_run = #{record.dtRun,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, status_run = #{record.statusRun,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, result_run = #{record.resultRun,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, elapsed_time = #{record.elapsedTime,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, run_node = #{record.runNode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, is_manual = #{record.isManual,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, pk_createdby = #{record.pkCreatedby,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, dt_created = #{record.dtCreated,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, pk_modifiedby = #{record.pkModifiedby,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, dt_modified = #{record.dtModified,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, ds = #{record.ds,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, version = #{record.version,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, clob_log = #{record.clobLog,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR}, run_cfg = #{record.runCfg,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR}

update schedule_log set pk_schedule_log = #{record.pkScheduleLog,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, pk_schedule = #{record.pkSchedule,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, dt_run = #{record.dtRun,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, status_run = #{record.statusRun,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, result_run = #{record.resultRun,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, elapsed_time = #{record.elapsedTime,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, run_node = #{record.runNode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, is_manual = #{record.isManual,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, pk_createdby = #{record.pkCreatedby,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, dt_created = #{record.dtCreated,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, pk_modifiedby = #{record.pkModifiedby,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, dt_modified = #{record.dtModified,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, ds = #{record.ds,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, version = #{record.version,jdbcType=DECIMAL}

update schedule_log
pk_schedule = #{pkSchedule,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
dt_run = #{dtRun,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
status_run = #{statusRun,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
result_run = #{resultRun,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
elapsed_time = #{elapsedTime,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
run_node = #{runNode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
is_manual = #{isManual,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
pk_createdby = #{pkCreatedby,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
dt_created = #{dtCreated,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
pk_modifiedby = #{pkModifiedby,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
dt_modified = #{dtModified,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
ds = #{ds,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
version = #{version,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
clob_log = #{clobLog,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR},
run_cfg = #{runCfg,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR},
where pk_schedule_log = #{pkScheduleLog,jdbcType=DECIMAL}

update schedule_log set pk_schedule = #{pkSchedule,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, dt_run = #{dtRun,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, status_run = #{statusRun,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, result_run = #{resultRun,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, elapsed_time = #{elapsedTime,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, run_node = #{runNode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, is_manual = #{isManual,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, pk_createdby = #{pkCreatedby,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, dt_created = #{dtCreated,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, pk_modifiedby = #{pkModifiedby,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, dt_modified = #{dtModified,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, ds = #{ds,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, version = #{version,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, clob_log = #{clobLog,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR}, run_cfg = #{runCfg,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR} where pk_schedule_log = #{pkScheduleLog,jdbcType=DECIMAL}

update schedule_log set pk_schedule = #{pkSchedule,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, dt_run = #{dtRun,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, status_run = #{statusRun,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, result_run = #{resultRun,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, elapsed_time = #{elapsedTime,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, run_node = #{runNode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, is_manual = #{isManual,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, pk_createdby = #{pkCreatedby,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, dt_created = #{dtCreated,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, pk_modifiedby = #{pkModifiedby,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, dt_modified = #{dtModified,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, ds = #{ds,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, version = #{version,jdbcType=DECIMAL} where pk_schedule_log = #{pkScheduleLog,jdbcType=DECIMAL}
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO schedule_log (pk_schedule_log, pk_schedule, dt_run, status_run, result_run, elapsed_time, run_node, is_manual, pk_createdby, dt_created, pk_modifiedby, dt_modified, ds, version, clob_log, run_cfg) VALUES
(#{item.pkScheduleLog}, #{item.pkSchedule}, #{item.dtRun}, #{item.statusRun}, #{item.resultRun}, #{item.elapsedTime}, #{item.runNode}, #{item.isManual}, #{item.pkCreatedby}, #{item.dtCreated}, #{item.pkModifiedby}, #{item.dtModified}, #{item.ds}, #{item.version}, #{item.clobLog}, #{item.runCfg})
